job_architecture.notes: GA in prod; market admin import, role definitions, level context, and role assignment. Keep role recasting and compensation-band workflows roadmap-labeled.

surveys.engagement_campaigns.notes: Pulse response collection is live under surveys.engine. Full engagement survey campaigns and manager-level attribution stay roadmap until this registry entry flips to GA and available.

nine_box.calibration.notes: Maya review on CAD-8677 accepted core 9-box as GA based on app-route and module-registry evidence. Keep KVD, predictive retention, and advanced movement analysis roadmap-labeled.

personality.insights.notes: CAD-9076/CAD-8607: personality_customer_ga flipped on prod (release v2026.07.02-6611b3c) after CAD-7702 soak PASS; render-verified + API smoke green. Professional tier entitlement includes the consented instrument, working-style profile, team view, coaching read-surface, and working-style support across 1:1 and coaching conversations.

security.sso_oidc.notes: CAD-7025/CAD-7367: buyer-usable OIDC SSO is production-live behind the Enterprise entitlement flag.

security.sso_saml.notes: CAD-7395 closed done 6/27: SAML shipped to prod (PR #809 + #818 in prod build 7ee95c7, CAD-7921 read-only prod verification, security sign-offs CAD-7402/7473). Canonical copy ruling 7/2: SAML SSO = live (Enterprise); NEVER bundle with SCIM in one label.

security.scim_provisioning.notes: SCIM auto-provisioning remains unimplemented (0 matches in cadence-api src; PeopleModule SCIM disabled). Q4 roadmap. Keep unbundled from SAML per canonical 7/2 ruling.

platform.connected_agents.notes: CAD-9066/CAD-9074: Connected Agents + MCP Audit modules live in prod; authenticated MCP endpoint proven end-to-end (CAD-7915). BYOA over open MCP standard with tenant-scoped permissions and per-request audit log. Included in Professional and Enterprise.
